response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with diverse project experience, including AI-agent infrastructure and open-source contributions. However, the role requires a Principal Engineer with 15+ years of experience, deep AI/ML expertise, and strategic leadership, which are not fully evident in the resume.
strengths: Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure systems
Open-source contributions and entrepreneurial projects (e.g., GISCollective)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent tooling and cloud technologies (e.g., MCP, AWS CDK)
concerns: Only ~12 years of professional experience (below the 15-year requirement)
Limited evidence of AI/ML product leadership or recognized expertise
No advanced degree in AI/ML or related field
